title: Panda Unique Item
description: A simple mod that adds lore text to say who forged an item and at what date when using an anvil. Removing a custom name will remove the lore.
body: # PandaUniqueItem ## Description A simple mod that adds lore text to say who forged an item and at what date when using an anvil. Removing a custom name will remove the lore. When an item holds sentimental value, nothing prevents someone from creating a duplicate with the same name and enchantments, making it impossible to distinguish between the originals. This mod solves that. ## Works Great With [Panda Block Name](https://modrinth.com/mod/pandablockname) By using them together, you can name blocks, and they will keep their forged lore & custom name when placed and picked up again. ## Screenshot ## Try it out `hardcoreanarchy.gay` (Deathban Anarchy) `sky.hardcoreanarchy.gay` (Skyblock Anarchy) ## Support [Support discord here!]( https://discord.gg/3tP3Tqu983) ## License [CC0](https://creativecommons.org/public-domain/cc0/)
